rulings.Case Title: LAUREL TIMMS et al VS. YING Y. WANG AKA THERESA WANG, TRUSTEE OF THE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Production Of Business Records On Non-Party Hanover And Awarding Monetary Sanctions; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 16, 2012, line 1. PLAINTIFFs LAUREL TIMMS and MATT MCNALLY's Motion For An Order Compelling Production Of Business Records On Non-Party Hanover And Awarding Monetary Sanctions; Request For Judicial Notice. Continued to October 19, 2012, per moving party. = (AJR/501)

rulings.Case Title: LAUREL TIMMS et al VS. YING Y. WANG AKA THERESA WANG, TRUSTEE OF THE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions And For Evidentiaary, Issue And Monetary Sanctions; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 16, 2012, line 1. PLAINTIFF LAUREL TIMMS and MATT MCNALLY's Motion For Terminating Sanctions And For Evidentiaary, Issue And Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiff's Motion for Terminating Sanctions is DENIED, except to the extent that it is ordered that Defendants may not introduce at trial or rely upon any document not produced to Plaintiffs in response to Plaintiff's Request for Production of Documents. Monetary sanctions are granted against Defendants in the amount of $8,488 to be paid on or before October 22, 2012. = (AJR/501)

rulings.Case Title: LAUREL TIMMS et al VS. YING Y. WANG AKA THERESA WANG, TRUSTEE OF THE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For An Order Quashing Deposition Subpoenas, Barring Or Limiting Depositions, And Awarding Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 16, 2012, line 1. PLAINTIFFs LAUREL TIMMS and MATT MCNALLY's Motion For An Order Quashing Deposition Subpoenas, Barring Or Limiting Depositions, And Awarding Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiff's Motion to Quash Deposition Subpoenas is granted in part, excluding personal use of the restaurant kitchen facilities. Deposition subpoenas are limited in scope as follows: (a) documents and things to be produced shall be limited to "Any and all documents relating to the rental and/or use of the deponent's kitchen facility by Laurel's Catering for the time period of March 15, 2008 through December 31, 2010; and (b) The matters upon which the witness is to be examined shall be limited to the "The rental and/or use of the deponent's kitchen facility by Laurel's Catering for the time period of March 15, 2008 through December 31, 2010." = (AJR/501)

rulings.Case Title: MARGARET D. FOSTER et al VS. JOHN F. BRITTON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 16, 2012, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION's AMENDED DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. Cross-Defendant's Demurrer is continued to October 31, 2012 for moving party to comply with SFLR 2.6B and 2.6C and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and operative complaint no later than October 19, 2012 4 pm. = (AJR/501)

rulings.Case Title: OWB REO, LLC VS. JAMES MORRISON
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 16, 2012, line 3. PLAINTIFF OWB REO, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is granted, subject to opposition. = (AJR/501)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES A HENNEFER VS. MARGARET A. SELTZER INDIVIDUALLY & D/B/A THE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 16, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT MARGARET SELTZER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer is overruled. Plaintiff properly alleged all elements of unlawful detainer. Defendant cannot challenge the veracity of allegations and/or make arguments based on extrinsic matters. Defendant's objections to Declaration of James Hennefer are sustained. = (AJR/501)

rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW VS. MARIA E ROSALES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 16, 2012, line 5. PLAINTIFF THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is granted, subject to opposition. = (AJR/501)

rulings.Case Title: AMBROSE RP, INC. VS. MARINA DEVILLE
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 16, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT MIMI COVE(SUED AS MIMIE) and MARINA DEVILL'S (SUED AS DEVILLE) DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Delta Motion to Quash is granted without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective, no distinction is made between two independent breaches and lease does not specify that late fees are "additional rent." = (AJR/501)

rulings.Case Title: JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. MATTHEW CRAIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 16, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT MATTHEW CRAIN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons and Complaint is DENIED. Defendant's Motion is untimely per CCP 1167.4. DEFENDANT's motion raises issues unrelated to complaint for forcible entry/detainer. = (AJR/501)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICK LENNEN VS. LUIS G. ARCE
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 16, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANT LUIS ARCE'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons and Complaint is GRANTED. Defednant was not served with Summons issued by the Court. = (AJR/501)
